operator_report.title: Telemetry Upload Report
operator_report.summary: The uploaded telemetry export can be reviewed, but one or more data quality or baseline comparison items need operator review.
key_observations: File contains 99999 data rows, 26 columns, and 18 numeric columns.
Baseline comparison analyzed 18 numeric columns using 4000 baseline rows and 4000 recent rows.
Columns flagged for operator review: hvac_runtime, dehumidifier_runtime, power_draw, recovery_time_minutes, relationship_stability_score, structural_drift_score, intervention_window_hours.
Schema mapping identified columns for: thermal, moisture, flow, chemical, energy, timing, location.
